title: Ghatak / Lethal
subTitle: For his father's treatment, Kashi and his father move into a colony on the outskirts of Mumbai. But when Kashi sees a local gangster terrorise the colony, he decides to strike back.

title: Ajab Gazabb Love
subTitle: Rajveer, a rich man, falls in love with Madhuri. However, he soon realises that she detests affluent people and in order to win her heart, he, along with his family, pretends to be poor.

title: Meri Haan Teri Naa
subTitle: A man manages to get into the Indian cricket team, but he decides to give it up so that his best friend can get married to the man she loves.

title: Ranbanka
subTitle: Rahul, an ordinary engineer, comes to Mathura with his wife and son. However, when a gangster gets attracted to his wife and forces her to marry him, he tries to find a way to stop his advances.

title: Yes Boss
subTitle: Rahul's boss, Siddharth, is a womaniser who exploits Rahul into helping him win over Seema. However, Rahul ends up falling for Seema and is torn between his career aspirations and her.

title: Haqdaar
subTitle: Bhanu is disliked by his father and rejected by the woman he loves because he is illiterate. When Swapna comes along, she changes him completely by educating and helping him become successful.

title: Chori Mera Kaam
subTitle: Chori Mera Kaam

title: Mafia Raaj
subTitle: An honest police officer has a mission to wipe out a mafia group. But in the process, he is forced to sacrifice not only his father but also his sister.

title: Coolie
subTitle: Zafar's obsessive love for Salma leads to her separation from her son, Iqbal. Twenty years later, Iqbal strives to reunite with his mother.

title: Kaun Kare Kurbanie
subTitle: Arjun Singh, a police inspector, lives peacefully with his family in Mumbai, until an alarming case of harassment and murder turns his life upside down.

title: Kaun Kare Kurbanie
subTitle: Arjun Singh, a police inspector, lives peacefully with his family in Mumbai, until an alarming case of harassment and murder turns his life upside down.

title: Star
subTitle: Dev belongs to a middle class family and dreams of becoming a music sensation like his icon Elvis Presley. However, his reality forces him to give up on his dream until he finds a job at Charlie's disco.

title: Aaj Ka Nayak
subTitle: Pugazhendi, a news reporter, accepts a challenge from the CM to be in power for a day. He rapidly goes about punishing and arresting corrupt officials and politicians, including the CM.

title: Aasman Se Ooncha
subTitle: Inspector Malik transfers to Mumbai along with his family and sets out on a mission to catch King, an underworld leader. However, a shocking revelation changes the course of their lives.

title: Shiva Shakti
subTitle: Shiva forms a close friendship with Shakti when he comes to the city to earn money for his sister Kusum's wedding. However, he later vows to kill Shakti when Kusum becomes pregnant with his child.

title: Mela
subTitle: Best mates Kishen and Shankar decide to help village belle Roopa avenge her family's death, but their friendship is tested in the process.

title: Shaktiman
subTitle: When Vicky and Amar get switched at birth, one grows up to be a police officer and the other a murderer. Things take a turn when their parents learn the truth.

title: Pariwaar
subTitle: Anita is abandoned by her relatives; however, her life drastically changes when she seeks refuge with Birju, a street performer.

title: Loafer
subTitle: Ravi, an unemployed man who constantly gets into fights, is framed for the murder of a gangster. With no support from his family, he must now fight to prove his innocence.

title: Loafer
subTitle: Ravi, an unemployed man who constantly gets into fights, is framed for the murder of a gangster. With no support from his family, he must now fight to prove his innocence.

title: Krishna Arjun
subTitle: After hearing the news of his mother's death, a man travels home to find his brother has been arrested for rape and murder. He sets out to uncover the truth.

title: Love Mocktail
subTitle: After rescuing a woman, a man reminisces about his love life and tells her about all the heartbreaks he endured in his quest to find his true love.

title: Kundan
subTitle: Thakur Shamsher Singh, a wealthy criminal, tries to befriend a newly-appointed police officer in order to gain his favour, only to find out that the policeman is immune to his tactics.

title: Insaniyat
subTitle: Inspector Amar must unite two rival crime bosses from different religious backgrounds to fight terrorism. In the process, he discovers the personal cost of being an honest cop.

title: Hatya: The Murder
subTitle: Ravi's father, Ratan, gets killed when he refuses to sell his land to Murugan, a wealthy businessman. Later, Ravi sets out to avenge the death of his father.

title: Mera Badla: Revenge
subTitle: Shankar Rao, a businessman, and his family start witnessing strange events in their house. Thereafter, he calls Dr Vijay, a psychiatrist, to help him.

title: Andhaa Kaanoon
subTitle: Two siblings, Vijay and Durga, vow to avenge the death of their parents. So, Durga becomes an inspector to punish the criminals, whereas Vijay breaks the law to achieve his goal.

title: Phool Aur Kaante
subTitle: Love leads Ajay down a new path when he is expected to inherit his father's criminal empire, bringing along perils that could either tear their family apart or solidify their bond.

title: Insaniyat
subTitle: Inspector Amar must unite two rival crime bosses from different religious backgrounds to fight terrorism. In the process, he discovers the personal cost of being an honest cop.
